title: Trump says Iran let 10 oil ships through Strait of Hormuz as a 'present' to U.S.
summary_full: Trump said the U.S has "very substantial talks going on with respect to Iran," though Tehran has denied direct talks have taken place.
summary_public: Trump said the U.S has "very substantial talks going on with respect to Iran," though Tehran has denied direct talks have taken place.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran let 10 oil ships through Strait of Hormuz
